name: TG File Share/Sharing Bot
description: file sharing bot store posts and it can access by special links

TG_BOT_TOKEN.description: Your Bot token, Get it from @Botfather

OWNER_ID.description: An integer of consisting of your owner ID

APP_ID.description: your app id, take it from my.telegram.org

API_HASH.description: your api hash, take it from my.telegram.org

CHANNEL_ID.description: make a channel (database channel), then make the bot as admin in channel, and it's id

FORCESUB_CHANNEL.description: id of the first channel, if you want enable force sub feature else put 0

FORCESUB_CHANNEL2.description: id of the second channel, if you want enable force sub feature else put 0

START_MSG.description: Optional: start message of bot, use HTML parsemode format
START_MSG.value: КңЙӘ бҙӣКңбҙҮКҖбҙҮ... {first}! рҹ’Ҙ ЙӘ бҙҖбҙҚ бҙҖ кң°ЙӘКҹбҙҮ кңұбҙӣбҙҸКҖбҙҮ КҷбҙҸбҙӣ...! ЙӘ бҙ„бҙҖЙҙ бҙҳКҖбҙҸбҙ ЙӘбҙ…бҙҮ бҙҳКҖЙӘбҙ бҙҖбҙӣбҙҮ кң°ЙӘКҹбҙҮкңұ бҙӣКңКҖбҙҸбҙңЙўКң бҙҖ кңұбҙҳбҙҮбҙ„ЙӘкң°ЙӘбҙ„ КҹЙӘЙҙбҙӢ....! бҙҳбҙҸбҙЎбҙҮКҖбҙҮбҙ… КҷКҸ - @Anime_X_Hunters

FORCE_SUB_MESSAGE.description: Optional: Force Sub message of bot, use HTML parsemode format
FORCE_SUB_MESSAGE.value:
КңбҙҮКҹКҹбҙҸ {first}!вҡЎ

рҹ«§бҙҳКҹбҙҮбҙҖкңұбҙҮ бҙҠбҙҸЙӘЙҙ КҷбҙҸбҙӣКң бҙҸкң° бҙҸбҙңКҖ бҙҖЙҙЙӘбҙҚбҙҮ бҙ„КңбҙҖЙҙЙҙбҙҮКҹкңұ бҙҖЙҙбҙ… бҙӣКҖКҸ бҙҖЙўбҙҖЙӘЙҙ...!

ADMINS.description: A space separated list of user_ids of Admins, they can only create links

PROTECT_CONTENT.description: Protect contents doesn't forward / else False
